reviews.comment:
Las estaciones de servicio ypf por lo general es caro todo , pero bueno hoy ypf aca te da la certeza que si existe algo mas caro .

(Translated by Google)
YPF gas stations are generally expensive, but well, today YPF here gives you the certainty that there is something even more expensive.

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo espacio verde alrededor para hacer una parada y despejarse. Los sanitarios completamente equipados y muy limpios. El personal es muy amable en todo momento. El shop tiene cocina y preparan hamburguesas, milanesas y papas fritas. Tienen sándwiches envasados y variedad de bebidas. Muy completo. Excelente atención.

(Translated by Google)
A lovely green space to stop and unwind. The restrooms are fully equipped and very clean. The staff is always very friendly. The shop has a kitchen and prepares hamburgers, breaded cutlets, and fries. They have packaged sandwiches and a variety of drinks. Very complete. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJM2Nfb3lnRRAB
